headlines.headline: Canada tops U.S. at hockey worlds, advances to semifinals
headlines.description: Macklin Celebrini scored again and Jet Greaves stopped 34 shots as Canada beat the United States 4-0 to advance to the semifinals at the ice hockey world championship on Thursday.

headlines.headline: 4-time Stanley Cup champion Claude Lemieux dies at 60
headlines.description: Claude Lemieux, who won the Stanley Cup four times during a memorable NHL career, has died, the NHL Alumni Association announced on Thursday. He was 60.

headlines.headline: Canadiens down 3-1 to Hurricanes after another no-show at home
headlines.description: The Canadiens have faced elimination in these playoffs before. But never with multiple games standing between them and the offseason, which is where things stand after Montreal's 4-0 loss to Carolina in Game 4.
